entry.title: New GWAC 47QTCK18D0030 awarded to ENTERPRISE SERVICES LLC for the amount of $2,500

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/ITS GWACBRANCH A CONT OP QTACA

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF GOVERNMENT-WIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACTS PROVIDE WORLDWIDE ACCESS TO IT SOLUTIONS SUCH AS SYSTEMS DESIGN, SOFTWARE ENGINEERING, INFORMATION ASSURANCE, AND ENTERPRISE ARCHITECTURE SOLUTIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0030 (PA0001) awarded to ENTERPRISE SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION PA01 IS HEREBY ISSUED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES: THE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE 17 NOVEMBER 2017 AWARDED ALLIANT 2 GWAC IS JULY 1, 2018. THE NOTICE TO PROCEED DATE IS JULY 1, 2018. THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) AND ORDERING PERIOD OF THE MASTER CONTRACT ARE AS FOLLOWS: BASE PERIOD: JULY 1, 2018 TO JUNE 30, 2023 OPTION PERIOD: JULY 1, 2023 TO JUNE 30, 2028

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0030 (PA0002) awarded to PERSPECTA ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/ITS GWACBRANCH A CONT OP QTACA

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: UNIQUE ENTITY ID OR LEGAL BUSINESS NAME CHANGE - NON-NOVATION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: . PURSUANT TO FAR 42.12, THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE CHANGE-OF-NAME MODIFICATION EXECUTED 11/1/2018, BY DCMA PLANO, VA. AS A RESULT OF THE CHANGE-OF-NAME, THE ALLIANT 2 GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC) 47QTCK18D0030 AND ALL TASK ORDERS AWARDED UNDER IT ARE CHANGED AS SPECIFIED OF THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MAKE THE FOLLOWING CHANGES TO THE CONTRACT: EFFECTIVE 31 JANUARY 2020, THE PROCURING CONTRACTING OFFICER (PCO) FOR THE ALLIANT 2 GWAC IS CHANGED FROM JOHN CAVADIAS TO ROMAN RODRIGUEZ.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0030 (PO0007) awarded to PERSPECTA ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS UNILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE A 90-DAY FORBEARANCE ON PERFORMANCE MILESTONES AND DELIVERABLES IN CONTRACT YEAR TWO OF THE ALLIANT 2 MASTER CONTRACT. THE MODIFICATION IS HEREBY ISSUED TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: PERFORMANCE BASED STANDARD (PBS) 90 DAY FORBEARANCE DUE DATE
CONTRACTOR ENGAGEMENT, PARTICIPATION 10/01/2020 CONTRACTOR ENGAGEMENT, PRODUCTION 10/01/2020 SMALL BUSINESS SUBCONTRACT REPORTING 06/30/2020 (60 DAY EXTENSION GRANTED BY SBA) ENVIRONMENTAL OBJECTIVES AND REQUIREMENTS GHG INVENTORY REPORTING 08/31/2020 THE CHANGE IS NOT AN EXTENSION OR RESCHEDULING OF SUBSEQUENT CONTRACT YEARS' PERFORMANCE MILESTONE AND DELIVERABLES. FOR CHANGES TO ACTIVE TASK ORDERS, PRIME CONTRACTORS ARE DIRECTED TO CONTACT THE ORDERING CONTRACTING OFFICER (OCO).NO FURTHER CHANGES ARE AUTHORIZED THROUGH THE CHANGE ORDER. THE APPLICATION OF FORBEARANCE PERIOD ACTIVITY IS OPTIONAL AND LIMITED TO ONE CONTRACT YEAR'S PAST PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL CONTRACT REFRESH MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING SECTIONS OF THE ALLIANT 2 GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC). THIS MODIFICATION SUPERSEDES ANY PREVIOUS VERSION OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0030 (PO0010) awarded to PERSPECTA ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
EO14042: EO 14042
THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING AMENDED SECTIONS OF THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) PERTAINING TO EXECUTIVE ORDER (EO) 14042, ENSURING ADEQUATE COVID SAFETY PROTOCOLS FOR FEDERAL CONTRACTORS AND FAR CLAUSE 52.223-99 TO YOUR GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC). THIS MODIFICATION SUPERSEDES ANY PREVIOUS VERSION OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0030 (PO0012) awarded to PERSPECTA ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO MUTUALLY CANCEL PERSPECTA ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS, LLC THE MASTER CONTRACT NUMBER 47QTCK18D0030 PURSUANT TO SUBSECTION G.24.3 CONTRACTUAL RESTRICTION TO ANY ASSIGNMENT. THIS CANCELLATION IS AT NO COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
